eval_cases.query: /ontology 현재 Seed 위에 의미 경계 얹어줘
eval_cases.expected_behavior: Reads top-level ## Seed, uses goal as idea, asks boundary and exactly three properties, then replaces top-level ## Ontology.

eval_cases.query: 이 goal이 어디까지를 가리키는지 boundary와 property 3개로 정해줘
eval_cases.expected_behavior: Creates a single latest ontology layer without asking for action or data types.
Route to evolve-step because the user asks to change Seed content.
Route to socrates because the user asks for Seed generation before ontology.
